gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward with excitement, opens arms wide, and smiles while introducing the fun world of addition
a person tilts their head slightly, raises a finger to their chin, and looks thoughtfully as they ask about putting together 5 and 5
a tutor holds up both hands, spreading fingers wide, while showing how to add 5 and 5 using their fingers
a person raises one hand with fingers outstretched, slowly counting each finger aloud while smiling encouragingly
a tutor adds another hand with fingers raised high, enthusiastically inviting the learners to count five more fingers
a person steps to the side, gestures toward the classroom objects with both hands, and invites the class to add together
a tutor bends slightly forward, encouragingly points toward the area with blocks, and asks everyone to find 5 blocks to add
a person spreads their arms wide, smiles broadly, and nods while celebrating the amazing job done in adding today
a tutor raises both arms excitedly, moves slightly forward, and joyfully announces that 5 plus 5 equals 10
